# Instructions Copilot – Change history

## Règles
When modifying existing code, always update the change history to reflect the changes made.
- Change history has to be in folder .github/.changes/history/*.md 
- Each change history file should be named with the format: YYYY-MM-DD-description.md
- Only include changes that are relevant to the codebase and provide value to future maintainers.
- For each change, include a brief summary of the change, the reason for the change, and any relevant links (e.g., pull request, issue).
- Use markdown formatting to improve readability (e.g., bullet points, headings).

## Optionnal
Additionally, you can document the change history in a file located in .github/.changes/Past folder.
